title: Mogalrajapuram caves
tagline: Mogalrajapuram caves — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: The Mogalrajapuram Caves are five rock-cut cave temple groups located in different parts of Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India.
overview.description: The Mogalrajapuram Caves are five rock-cut cave temple groups located in different parts of Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India. Dedicated to Shiva, they were excavated during the Eastern Chalukya reign or the Vishnukundins reign. They are generally dated to about the 7th century, after the Akkanna Madanna Caves. They are simple and small, yet the artwork and iconography is more sophisticated than Akkanna Madanna Caves.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vijayawada Urban mandal
topPlaces.description: Vijayawada Urban mandal was a mandal in Krishna district of Andhra Pradesh. In 2018 it was bifurcated into 4 mandals under re-organization of revenue mandals and formed Vijayawada Central, Vijayawada North, Vijayawada East and Vijayawada West which were later incorporated into NTR district.

topPlaces.name: Andhra Pradesh Capital Region
topPlaces.description: Andhra Pradesh Capital Region (ISO: Āndhra Pradēś Rājadhāni Prāntaṁ) is the metropolitan area of the capital city of Andhra Pradesh in India. The region is spread across the districts of Krishna, Guntur, Palnadu, NTR, Bapatla and Eluru.

topPlaces.name: Vijayawada West mandal
topPlaces.description: Vijayawada West mandal is one of the 20 mandals in the NTR district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is one of the four mandals that formed from the Vijayawada Urban mandal after bifurcation in 2018 under the reorganization of revenue mandals.

topPlaces.name: Mogalrajapuram
topPlaces.description: Mogalrajapuram is a major residential and commercial area in Vijayawada. It is one of the shopping district of the city.

topPlaces.name: One Town, Vijayawada
topPlaces.description: One Town (or Old Town) is a commercial area of the city of Vijayawada. It is a part of Old Town area of the city.

topPlaces.name: Bhavanipuram
topPlaces.description: Bhavanipuram is a residential hub located to the West Central of Vijayawada in Andhra Pradesh, India. The locality shares its borders with Vijayawada Bypass Road and National Highway 65.

topPlaces.name: Indira Gandhi Stadium (Vijayawada)
topPlaces.description: Indira Gandhi Stadium (formerly Municipal Stadium) is located in Vijayawada city of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. The stadium has hosted a solitary ODI between India and West Indies on Sunday, 24 November 2002.

topPlaces.name: Benz Circle Flyover
topPlaces.description: Benz Circle Flyover is a flyover spanning the Benz Circle area in Vijayawada, India. The 2.3 kilometres (1.4 mi) long flyover is part of the expansion of National Highway 16 and National Highway 65.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mogalrajapuram caves?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mogalrajapuram caves is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mogalrajapuram caves?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Vijayawada Airport (16 km) and the nearest railway station is Vijayawada Junction (3 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mogalrajapuram caves?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mogalrajapuram caves at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mogalrajapuram caves?
faq.a: Stays in Mogalrajapuram caves start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mogalrajapuram caves?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vijayawada Urban mandal, Andhra Pradesh Capital Region, Vijayawada West mandal, Mogalrajapuram, One Town, Vijayawada.
